steps.title: Find the unit multiplier
steps.content:
Let $k=b^{1/n}$, so $f(x)=ak^x$. From $x=4$ to $x=7$, the output changes by a factor of:
$$
\frac{135}{5}=27
$$
The input increases by $3$, so:
$$
k^3=27
$$
$$
k=3
$$

steps.title: Move from seven to nine
steps.content:
From $x=7$ to $x=9$ is two more unit steps, so multiply by $3^2$:
$$
f(9)=135\cdot 3^2
$$
$$
f(9)=135\cdot 9=1215
$$

steps.title: State the value
steps.content: The model value at $x=9$ is $1215$. The answer is 1215.
